title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at 91Springboard

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at 91Springboard
jsonLd.description:
91Springboard, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About 91Springboard:
91Springboard is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 91Springboard!
